Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

Class McpDispatcher

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp.McpDispatcher
public class McpDispatcher extends Object
Transport-agnostic JSON-RPC dispatcher for the MCP wire protocol.

The dispatcher contains zero HTTP plumbing; it accepts a parsed JsonRpcRequest, routes by method, and returns a JsonRpcResponse. McpRestServlet is a thin adapter that wraps this dispatcher in a Juneau REST @RestPost method, but embedders are free to call dispatch(JsonRpcRequest, McpServerConfig, BeanStore) directly from tests or from a non-Juneau servlet.

Notification requests (those with a null id) return null; HTTP adapters should map this to 204 No Content.

  • Method Details

    • dispatch

      public JsonRpcResponse dispatch(JsonRpcRequest req, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx)
      Dispatch the supplied JSON-RPC request against the supplied configuration.
      Parameters:
      req - JSON-RPC request envelope. Never null.
      config - Server config (handler registry, capabilities, cursor strategy). Never null.
      ctx - Per-request bean store (passed through to handlers). Never null.
      Returns:
      The response, or null for notification requests.
